source: Chat-pasted ESPHome hardware logs from 2026-05-12 supervised CONFIG_5 defrost eco/normal TX smoke test
provenance: Curated active TX command and heater echo packet pairs from live hardware testing. The snippets were pasted into the project chat and capture successful D06 defrost eco/normal changes after the ESP-IDF 5 RMT migration.

transactions.label: CONFIG_5 defrost ECO
transactions.notes: Controller command set D06 defrost eco mode to ECO; heater echoed D06 as ECO while normalizing CONFIG_5 byte 4 from 0x1E to 0x4A.

allowed_echo_normalizations.notes: Observed heater normalization of adjacent CONFIG_5 byte while accepting D06 ECO.

transactions.label: CONFIG_5 defrost NORMAL
transactions.notes: Controller command set D06 defrost eco mode back to NORMAL; heater echoed D06 as NORMAL while normalizing CONFIG_5 byte 4 from 0x4A to 0x1E.

allowed_echo_normalizations.notes: Observed heater normalization of adjacent CONFIG_5 byte while accepting D06 NORMAL.
